task_description: Create or select a case and select report types to produce
Enter the property address and location identifiers
Enter property reference numbers and external identifiers (BBR cadastral references)
Register owner name and contact information
Capture owner signature (PDF document)
Enter client information and reference numbers
Enter surveyor name license number and contact information
Enter inspection date time and reference numbers
Select which report types to produce for this inspection
Review and confirm external data prefill (BBR lookup prior inspection data)
Add building or storey plan as an image file
Add a new room with building/level designation and room designation
Set room designation (name) and building/level designation
Provide justification if room is not visited
Select floor materials using multiple description methods
Select wall materials using multiple description methods
Select ceiling materials using multiple description methods
Select window type from available options
Select door type from available options
Select skirting board type from available options
Enter additional room information and notes
Configure mission type analysis scope property purpose and occupant information for lead report
